title: With sights on huge gains, Biocon to scale up AI focus
description: Biopharma major Biocon is significantly scaling up its adoption of artificial intelligence across its operations, from R&D to manufacturing and procurement. This strategic investment aims to achieve substantial cost savings, accelerate drug development timelines, and enhance its competitive edge in the global market.

title: Newest Anthropic AI 'Claude' exposes software weaknesses
description: Anthropic on Tuesday said its yet-to-be-released artificial intelligence model called Claude Mythos has proven keenly adept at exposing software weaknesses.
content:
NEW YORK - Anthropic on Tuesday said its yet-to-be-released artificial intelligence model called Claude Mythos has proven keenly adept at exposing software weaknesses.

title: AI tool predicts Barrett’s esophagus recurrence with high accuracy
description: A new artificial intelligence (AI)–based tool shows promise for improving surveillance in patients treated with endoscopic eradication therapies for Barrett's esophagus (BE) related dysplasia and early esophageal adenocarcinoma.

title: Anthropic Lets Apple, Amazon Test More Powerful Mythos AI Model
description: Anthropic PBC is letting tech firms access a more powerful, unreleased artificial intelligence model to help prepare for possible cyberattacks that might result from the company making the advanced AI system more widely available.

title: Maharashtra Cabinet Approves Dedicated Department Of Electronics, IT And AI With 427 Cadre Posts And ₹133 Crore Annual Outlay
description: The Maharashtra Cabinet has approved a new Department of Electronics, IT and Artificial Intelligence to strengthen digital governance. The move includes creating over 800 posts, a dedicated IT cadre, and an e-Mission team. Officials said it will enhance service delivery, cybersecurity, and data-driven decision-making across sectors.
content: Mumbai: In a major push towards digital governance and technological advancement, the Maharashtra Cabinet on Tuesday approved the creation of a dedicated Department of Electronics, Information Technology and Artificial Intelligence. The decision was ... [2089 chars]

title: AI Helped Fuel $21 Billion in Cybercrime Losses in 2025
description: According to the FBI's latest Internet Crime Complaint Center (IC3) report, artificial intelligence is playing a growing role in online scams that cost Americans nearly $21 billion in 2025.
content:
Artificial intelligence is playing a growing role in online scams that cost Americans nearly $21 billion in 2025, according to the FBI's latest Internet Crime Complaint Center (IC3) report.
